Arguments.query: INSERT INTO public.lessons_learned (topic, content, agent, session_id, tags, importance, superseded) VALUES ('RingCentral Telemetry Caching & Filtering', 'Implemented an on-demand cache-on-miss system for RingCentral call logs, caching historical query parameters infinitely in Supabase under date-partitioned keys. Configured timezone-aware Pacific boundary selectors using en-CA locale, preventing log leakage beyond the filtered day. Integrated talk-time agent occupancy metrics with zero-division guards.', 'antigravity', 'ff378d02-d923-42a8-b239-131121d578c8', ARRAY['nextjs', 'telemetry', 'ringcentral', 'caching'], 5, false);

args.toolAction: Inserting lessons learned into memory database
